templates.seshmemLoader:
# Session Memory Loader

To restore context from a previous session, run the following in your Claude Code terminal:

```
/seshmem:load
```

## Load Options
- `/seshmem:load` — loads the most recent checkpoint
- `/seshmem:load 3` — loads the last 3 checkpoints (shows progression)
- `/seshmem:load <filename>` — loads a specific checkpoint by name (without .md)

## Extra Seshmem Load Arguments
> Add any additional context or instructions for the session memory load here.
